commit.subject: LU-13805 tests: janitor testing for csi_complete (4)
commit.message:
LU-13805 tests: janitor testing for csi_complete (4)

This change is to generate testing of csi_complete and
mm handling on Janitor, specifically to repeatedly test
a specific set of tests which have failed previously.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: clientversion=do_not_test_this
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I0d1180c8e5a2b342fa0aa9bb1cb78f06b707e246
